meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: OpenSEO
products.tagline: The open source Ahrefs alternative
products.summaryZh: 开源版Ahrefs替代方案
products.descriptionZh: 没有优质数据，你的智能体只能给出泛泛建议。关键词研究、竞品分析、外链与网站审计，每月仅需10美元，而非100美元以上的订阅费用。通过MCP连接，你就能与智能体协作，制定SEO策略并撰写贴合公司需求的内容。
products.description: Without good data, your agent gives generic advice. Keyword research, competitor research, backlinks and site audits, starting at $10/month instead of a $100-plus monthly subscription. Connect with MCP so that you can work with your agent to build an SEO strategy and write content tailored to your company.

products.name: Spycost
products.tagline: Fell for a discount again?
products.summaryZh: 又中了折扣的圈套？
products.descriptionZh: 还记得上次打折时买的东西，后来发现没折扣也是这个价吗？或者今天比昨天更贵？是不是有种被欺骗的感觉？准备好看清那些操纵和谎言背后的真相了吗？Spycost 帮你识别何时你以为在省钱，实际却在多花钱。它呈现完整的价格图景，让你判断是否真的值得。
products.description: Remember the last time you bought something at a discount, only to see it later for the same price without the discount? Or when the product costs more today than it did yesterday. Did you feel cheated? Are you ready to look behind the screen of manipulation and lies? Spycost helps you see when you’re paying more while thinking you’re paying less. It gives you the full price picture, so you can decide whether it’s actually worth it.

products.name: Kobbe
products.tagline: Privacy-friendly web analytics with traffic and revenue.
products.summaryZh: 注重隐私的网站分析，涵盖流量与收入数据。
products.descriptionZh: 保护隐私且无需Cookie的网站分析工具。流量、页面、来源、收入及转化漏斗。默认隐私保护。数秒即可完成设置。
products.description: Privacy-friendly and cookie-less analytics for your website. Traffic, pages, sources, revenue and funnels. Private by default. Set up in seconds.

products.name: BaseRT
products.tagline: 6.4x faster than llama.cpp, 3.9x faster than MLX
products.summaryZh: 比llama.cpp快6.4倍，比MLX快3.9倍
products.descriptionZh: BaseRT 是 Apple Silicon 上最快的 LLM 运行时。通过一条命令即可安装，并在你自己的设备上运行本地模型。
products.description: BaseRT is the fastest LLM runtime on Apple Silicon. Install it with one command and run local models on your own device.

products.name: Rewisp
products.tagline: See it once. Ask forever.
products.summaryZh: 一次看见，永远提问。
products.descriptionZh: Rewisp 为你的 Mac 赋予记忆。它在设备端读取屏幕文本并为你记住。捕捉诸如“我周五发给你”这样的承诺，并持续提醒直到完成。问一句“周二以来有什么变化？”，就能看到具体的新内容。按语义搜索，而非仅靠关键词。追踪体重、成绩等数字随时间的变化。用已保存的信息自动填写表单——密码除外。每晚9点安静地推送一次摘要。完全隐私：从不保存截图，只有文本留在你的 Mac 上。
products.description: Rewisp gives your Mac a memory. It reads your screen text on-device and remembers it for you. Catches promises like "I'll send it Friday" and reminds you until it's done. Ask "what changed since Tuesday?" and see exactly what's new. Search by meaning, not just words. Tracks numbers like weight or grades over time. Fills forms from your saved details — never passwords. One quiet 9 PM summary each day. Fully private: screenshots never saved, only text stays on your Mac.

products.name: Double
products.tagline: Your AI career agent that gets you hired
products.summaryZh: 你的AI职业助手，助你成功入职
products.descriptionZh: Double 是你的个人AI职业助手。只需发一条消息，它就能管理你的整个职业生涯：帮你找到合适的职位、代你投递申请、拓展并维护人脉，还能让招聘方主动来找你。
products.description: Double is your personal AI career agent. Just text it, and it manages your entire career: finding your roles, applying for you, growing and maintaining your network, and making recruiters chase after you.

products.name: CitedSpy
products.tagline: Track your brand in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and More
products.summaryZh: 在ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity等平台追踪你的品牌
products.descriptionZh: CitedSpy帮助品牌追踪并提升在AI搜索中的可见度。监控贵公司在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude、Perplexity及其他AI助手中被提及、引用和推荐的频率。发现引用缺口，对标竞争对手，优化生成引擎优化（GEO）策略，确保当买家向AI寻求解决方案时，您的品牌能被推荐。
products.description: CitedSpy helps brands track and improve their visibility in AI search. Monitor how often your company is mentioned, cited, and recommended across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, and other AI assistants. Discover citation gaps, benchmark competitors, and optimize your Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategy so your brand gets recommended when buyers ask AI for solutions.

products.name: Pelagic Analytics
products.tagline: The Google Analytics alternative that grows your traffic.
products.summaryZh: Google Analytics的替代方案，助力提升网站流量。
products.descriptionZh: Pelagic 是一款内置 AI SEO 代理的 Google Analytics 替代方案。可查看客户来源及转化原因。该代理每日自动运行：研究您所在领域的关键词，撰写符合搜索意图的文章，并为您发布。无需 Cookie、实时追踪、无需同意横幅。免费试用 3 天。
products.description: Pelagic is a Google Analytics alternative with an AI SEO agent built in. See where customers come from and what makes them convert. The agent goes to work every day: researching keywords in your niche, writing articles that match search intent, and publishing them for you. Cookieless, real-time, and no consent banner. Try it free for 3 days.

products.name: Panguard.AI
products.tagline: Open-source malware scanner and runtime guard for AI agents
products.summaryZh: 开源恶意软件扫描器与AI代理运行时防护
products.descriptionZh: 你的AI代理运行第三方技能和MCP服务器时，可完全访问你的文件、密钥和Shell——无沙箱、无审查。我扫描了96,096个已发布的技能，其中751个是恶意的。PanGuard会在你安装技能前进行审查，扫描已有内容，并在运行时拦截劫持尝试。免费、MIT许可、完全在设备端运行。基于768条开放ATR规则，已集成至Microsoft、Cisco、MISP和OWASP工具中。一条命令：npm install -g panguard && pga up
products.description: Your AI agent runs third-party skills and MCP servers with full access to your files, keys and shell — no sandbox, no review. I scanned 96,096 published skills; 751 were malicious. PanGuard vets a skill before you install it, scans what you already have, and blocks hijack attempts at runtime. Free, MIT, fully on-device. Powered by 768 open ATR rules, already merged into Microsoft, Cisco, MISP and OWASP tooling. One command: npm install -g panguard && pga up

products.name: HeimWall
products.tagline: Catch secrets before they leak into Cursor & Claude
products.summaryZh: 在秘密泄露给Cursor和Claude之前将其捕获
products.descriptionZh: HeimWall 在机密信息、凭证及个人身份信息即将抵达 Cursor、Claude Code、Copilot 等 AI 编程助手时，即时将其拦截。这是一款轻量级 macOS 应用，完全在设备端运行：47 条手写规则实时标记泄露风险。你的提示词始终留在 Mac 上，不存储任何内容，无需账户，无需注册。个人工程师免费使用。下一步：推出团队仪表盘，向安全负责人展示泄露趋势，但不暴露任何人的输入内容——只呈现信号，而非内容。欢迎设计合作伙伴。
products.description: HeimWall catches leaked secrets, credentials, and PII the moment they're about to reach AI coding assistants like Cursor, Claude Code, and Copilot. A lightweight macOS app, fully on-device: 47 hand-written rules flag leaks in real time. Your prompts never leave your Mac. No content stored, no account, no signup. Free for individual engineers. Next up: a team dashboard showing security leads leak trends without exposing what anyone typed. Signal, not content. Design partners welcome.

products.name: SocialKaptan
products.tagline: Grow on LinkedIn & Instagram without the busywork
products.summaryZh: 在LinkedIn和Instagram上增长，无需繁琐工作
products.descriptionZh: SocialKaptan通过AI驱动的评论和定时发布，自动化LinkedIn和Instagram的互动。在本地桌面运行，实现更安全、一致的B2B社交增长。
products.description: SocialKaptan automates LinkedIn and Instagram engagement with AI-powered comments and scheduled posts. Runs locally on your desktop for safer, consistent B2B social growth.

products.name: Recume
products.tagline: AI that spots car scams before they cost you
products.summaryZh: 能提前识别汽车骗局的人工智能
products.descriptionZh: 上传任意汽车零件照片。即刻获得AI诊断、维修费用估算及专家建议——花费不到一杯咖啡的价格。
products.description: Upload a photo of any car part. Get an instant AI diagnosis, repair cost estimate, and expert recommendations — for less than a cup of coffee.

products.name: Tansei — A simple shelf for your Mac
products.tagline: Built for work in motion. Designed to stay close.
products.summaryZh: 为移动办公而生，为贴身随行而设计。
products.descriptionZh: 切换应用，思路不断。你复制的颜色、ChatGPT 里的某句话、马上要用到的文件——Tansei 将它们固定在屏幕边缘，随时拖回使用。所有内容保留在你的 Mac 上，设计上确保隐私，无需账户。免费试用 3 天，之后一次性付费。
products.description: Switch apps without losing the thread. The color you copied. The line from ChatGPT. The file you’ll need in a minute. Tansei keeps them pinned at the edge of your screen, ready to drag back the moment you need them. Everything stays on your Mac, private by design, no account needed. Try it free for 3 days, then pay once.

products.name: NeoAudit
products.tagline: Audit any website. Know exactly what to fix.
products.summaryZh: 审计任何网站。精准定位需修复之处。
products.descriptionZh: NeoAudit 可将任意公开网址转化为清晰、可操作的网站健康报告——无需注册或复杂仪表盘。它检查技术SEO、性能、移动端适配、无障碍性、结构化数据、AI发现能力、信任信号、社交分享及安全卫生。检测基于确定性规则而非AI生成，结果保留在浏览器中，报告可导出为PDF、HTML或JSON格式。
products.description: NeoAudit turns any public URL into a clear, actionable website health report—without signup or a complicated dashboard. It checks technical SEO, performance, mobile readiness, accessibility, structured data, AI discovery, trust signals, social sharing, and security hygiene. The checks are deterministic rather than AI-generated, results stay in your browser, and reports can be exported as PDF, HTML, or JSON.

products.name: ArchiMind
products.tagline: ArchiMind analyzes a GitHub repository and produces
products.summaryZh: ArchiMind 分析 GitHub 仓库并生成
products.descriptionZh: ArchiMind 分析 GitHub 仓库并生成：分章节架构文档、高层级和低层级 Mermaid 图表、对话式项目摘要、已认证用户的持久化历史记录。
products.description: ArchiMind analyzes a GitHub repository and produces: chapter-wise architecture documentation, high-level and low-level Mermaid diagrams, conversational project summary, persistent history for authenticated users.

products.name: ReadyStill
products.tagline: One screenshot. Ready everywhere.
products.summaryZh: 一张截图，随处可用。
products.descriptionZh: 将任意网页转化为精致、可发布的视觉素材。可截取元素、区域、可见页面或整页（测试版），随后应用精选样式、背景、间距、边框、阴影及浏览器外壳。查看建议的敏感区域，手动进行遮盖，复制单张PNG，或导出六种适用于社交媒体、开放图谱、网络商店及博客的尺寸。处理过程在本地运行。可免费导出10次，之后一次性解锁需1899卢比。需使用免费邮箱账户。
products.description: Turn any webpage into polished, launch-ready visuals. Capture an element, region, visible page, or full page (Beta), then apply curated styles, backgrounds, spacing, borders, shadows, and browser chrome. Review suggested sensitive areas, redact manually, copy one PNG, or export six social, Open Graph, Web Store, and blog sizes. Processing runs locally. Try 10 free exports, then unlock for ₹1,899 once. Free email account required.

products.name: Detourmap
products.tagline: Every place worth the detour, on one interactive map
products.summaryZh: 所有值得绕道前往的地方，尽在一张互动地图中。
products.descriptionZh: 一张免费互动世界地图，收录了70,520个值得专程前往的地点——包括古代遗址、海滩、洞穴、瀑布、火山、纪念碑、圣地、城堡、博物馆、花园、主题公园和鬼城，覆盖350个国家。选择一个国家，开启筛选功能，即可开始探索。
products.description: A free interactive world map of 70,520 places worth going out of your way for — ancient ruins, beaches, caves, waterfalls, volcanoes, monuments, sacred sites, castles, museums, gardens, theme parks and ghost towns across 350 countries. Pick a country, flip on the filters, and explore.

products.name: Wishlist and gifts - Farha
products.tagline: Wishlist and gifting app
products.summaryZh: 心愿单与送礼应用
products.descriptionZh: Farha是一款面向家庭的免费心愿单应用。可从任意商店创建心愿单，通过链接分享（无需注册），并借助秘密预留和群组送礼功能协调礼物。
products.description: Farha is a free wishlist app for families. Create wishlists from any store, share via link (no signup needed), and coordinate gifts with secret reservations and group gifting.

products.name: KillAI
products.tagline: Filter AI-generated content from YouTube
products.summaryZh: 过滤YouTube上的AI生成内容
products.descriptionZh: KillAI是一款注重隐私的Chrome扩展，旨在帮助你清理YouTube信息流，专注于真正的创作者、人工制作的内容和有意义的讨论。
products.description: KillAI is a privacy-focused Chrome extension designed to help you clean your YouTube feed and focus on real creators, human-made content, and meaningful discussions.

products.name: CareerGini
products.tagline: The Unified AI Engine for Career Success
products.summaryZh: 统一AI引擎，助力职业成功
products.descriptionZh: CareerGini是终极AI职业伴侣，通过100%私密的AI数据湖将学生、院校和招聘方连接在一起。可构建AI简历、绘制技能差距、了解你的基尼评分卡，并确保获得顶级职位。
products.description: CareerGini is the ultimate AI Career Companion uniting Students, Institutions, and Recruiters through a 100% Private AI data lake. Build AI resumes, map skill gaps, know your Gini Score Card, and secure top placements.
